info.title: External API
info.description: External API endpoints for third-party integrations with Taqtics platform. These endpoints allow external systems to manage users, stores, designations, tickets, webhooks, processes, and retrieve data exports.

400.description: Bad request

post.description:
Generates a JWT authentication token for accessing external API endpoints.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

Use the returned token in the Authorization header for all subsequent API calls.

400.description: Bad request - Invalid input or company configuration issues

value.message: API is not accessible for company: {companyId}, Please contact Taqtics
Your account is locked, please contact admin

post.description:
Creates a new user in the system with the specified details.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Password Requirements:** Minimum 8 characters with at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one digit, and one special character.

**Country Codes:** Valid values are 91, 971, 973, 965, 974, 966, 968

email.description: Email address of the user (will be converted to lowercase)

password.description: User password (min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, digit, and special character)

storeName.description: Store name where user is assigned

password.description: Auto-generated password (only returned if validEmail is false and no password provided)

400.description: Bad request - Validation error or creation failed

value.message: User Limit Exceeded. Please contact Taqtics

get.description:
Retrieves user information for the company.

Query behavior:
- If `userEmail` is provided, returns the matching user.
- If `employeeId` is provided, returns the matching user.
- If both are provided, `userEmail` is used.
- If neither is provided, returns all users.

Response notes:
- The `data` field is always an array.
- For single-user queries, the array contains one user object.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

parameters.name: employeeId
parameters.description: Employee ID for filtering user data

400.description: Bad request - Company id not found or user not found

put.description:
Updates user details for the specified email address.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

parameters.name: userEmail
parameters.description: Email address of the user to update

empId.description: Employee ID (can be set to null)

storeName.description: Store name where user is assigned

supervisorEmail.description: Email of the user's supervisor (can be set to null)

resetPassword.description: Whether to reset the user's password

400.description: Bad request - Validation error or update failed

delete.description:
Deletes a user from the system.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Note:** Users with ownership of resources cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: userEmail
parameters.description: Email address of the user to delete

400.description: Bad request - Cannot delete user

value.message: User has ownership and cannot be deleted

post.description:
Creates a new store/location in the system.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

entityId.description: Unique entity identifier for the store

storeRadius.description: Geofence radius for the store in meters

400.description: Bad request - Validation error or creation failed

value.message: Store Limit Exceeded. Please contact Taqtics

get.description:
Retrieves store details.

If `storeEntityId` is provided, it fetches specific store information.

If `storeEntityId` is not provided, it fetches all store information.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Company id not found or store not found

get.description:
Retrieves all available store tags for the company.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Unable to fetch tags

put.description:
Updates store details for the specified entity ID.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

parameters.name: storeEntityId
parameters.description: Entity ID of the store to update

400.description: Bad request - Validation error or update failed

delete.description:
Deletes a store from the system.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Note:** Stores with assigned staff cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: storeEntityId
parameters.description: Entity ID of the store to delete

400.description: Bad request - Cannot delete store

value.message: Store has staff that needs to be transfereed to another store

get.description:
Retrieves all designations/roles configured for the company.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Cannot fetch roles

post.description:
Creates a new designation/role in the system.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Valid User Roles:** admin, companyAdmin, areaManager, storeEmployee, nonCreatorCompanyAdmin, nonCreatorAreaManager, nonCreatorStoreManager, processManager, userManager, storeManager

userRole.description: System role assigned to this designation

400.description: Bad request - Validation error or creation failed

value.message: Role Limit Exceeded. Please contact Taqtics

delete.description:
Deletes a designation/role from the system.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Cannot delete designation

post.description:
Creates a new ticket in the system.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Priority Values:** highest, high, medium, low, lowest

description.example: The coffee machine is not working properly

entityId.description: Store entity ID associated with the ticket

400.description: Bad request - Validation error or creation failed

value.message: Neither store nor assignee could be determined for the ticket, and no default assignee is set

get.description:
Retrieves all available ticket tags for the company.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Unable to fetch tags

get.description:
Retrieves the automatic ticket generation configuration.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Cannot fetch configuration

value.message: Unable to fetch auto ticket configuration

get.description:
Retrieves ticket details by ticket ID.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Ticket not found

put.description:
Updates ticket details for the specified ticket ID.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Status Values:** open, closed, inProgress, onHold, completed

**Priority Values:** highest, high, medium, low, lowest

comment.description: Comment to add to the ticket

updatedBy.description: Email of the person updating the ticket

400.description: Bad request - Update failed

value.message: Auto ticket error message from core

delete.description:
Deletes a ticket from the system.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Cannot delete ticket

get.description:
Retrieves sample webhook payload data for ticket events.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

This endpoint returns example payloads that will be sent to your webhook URL when ticket events occur.

200.description: Sample ticket webhook payloads retrieved successfully

400.description: Bad request - Cannot fetch sample data

value.message: Error fetching recent tickets from core

get.description:
Retrieves sample webhook payload data for form submission events.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

This endpoint returns an example payload that will be sent to your webhook URL when form submissions occur.

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: Form ID to get sample submission data for

200.description: Sample submission webhook payload retrieved successfully

400.description: Bad request - Cannot fetch sample data

get.summary: Get action point webhook sample data
get.description:
Retrieves sample webhook payload data for action point events.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

This endpoint returns an example payload that will be sent to your webhook URL when action point events occur.

200.description: Sample action point webhook payload retrieved successfully

400.description: Bad request - Cannot fetch sample data

put.description:
Subscribes a webhook URL to receive events for specific event types.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Event Types:** process, ticket, actionPoint, asset

**Note:** For 'process' type, formId is required.

type.description: Type of events to subscribe to

400.description: Bad request - Subscription failed

value.message: Failed to subscribe url for form submission

put.description:
Unsubscribes from receiving webhook events for specific event types.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

**Event Types:** process, ticket, actionPoint, asset

**Note:** For 'process' type, formId is required.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of events to unsubscribe from

400.description: Bad request - Unsubscription failed

value.message: Failed to subscribe url for form submission

get.description:
Retrieves the list of reviewers configured for a specific form/process.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

parameters.name: entityId
parameters.description: Store entity ID for filtering reviewers

400.description: Bad request - Cannot fetch reviewers

value.message: Form {formIndex} does not have review configurations

get.description:
Retrieves the form structure and payload for a specific form/process.

**Rate Limit:** 20 requests per time window

400.description: Bad request - Cannot fetch form payload

value.message: Store with Entity ID: {entityId} not found

post.description:
Submits a completed form/process for a specific store.

**Rate Limit:** 50 requests per time window

**Note:** This endpoint has a higher rate limit due to the nature of form submissions.

**Date Format:** Submission date should be in yyyy-mm-dd format (e.g., "2026-01-05")

entityId.description: Store entity ID where form is being submitted

submissionDate.description: Date of submission in yyyy-mm-dd format

response.description: Answer to the question (type varies by question type)

reviewers.description: Array of reviewers (required if form has review process)

400.description: Bad request - Submission failed

value.message: Form with form Index: {formIndex} not found
Store with Entity ID: {entityId} not found
Process Record is already available for this period
Form validation schema with form Index: {formIndex} not found

get.description:
Retrieves monthly CSV dump file for a specific form/process.

**Rate Limit:** 10 requests per time window

**Note:** This endpoint has a lower rate limit due to the size of data exports.

**Date Format:** monthYear should be in MM-YYYY format (e.g., "01-2026" for January 2026)

parameters.name: formId
parameters.description: Form ID to get CSV data for

parameters.name: monthYear
parameters.description: Month and year in MM-YYYY format

400.description: Bad request

value.message: The requested file could not be found for {formId}/{monthYear}

400.description: Bad request

message.description: Error message describing what went wrong

description.example: The coffee machine is not working properly

TicketWebhookPayload.description: Webhook payload sent when ticket events occur

SubmissionWebhookPayload.description: Webhook payload sent when form submission events occur

ActionPointWebhookPayload.description: Webhook payload sent when action point events occur

tags.name: Webhooks
tags.description: Webhook subscription and sample data endpoints

externalDocs.description: Download all API endpoints in JSON
